name: old-github
description: Restore the 2012-2013 GitHub layout as a Chrome extension.

scripts.prebuild: npm run build:icons && npm run build:ext-icons
scripts.predev: npm run build:icons && npm run build:ext-icons
scripts.test: node scripts/test-routes.mjs && node scripts/test-rate-limit.mjs && node scripts/test-proxy-policy.mjs && node scripts/test-session.mjs
